title: Flow If/Else
description: A two-branch conditional router. Evaluates a user-supplied Python expression
against each incoming chunk; truthy routes the chunk to THEN downstream nodes,
falsy / error / timeout routes it to ELSE. Works on any content type the engine
dispatches — text, image, audio, video, table, documents, questions, answers,
classifications — because branch selection happens at the binder's shared dispatch
layer via setTargetFilter, not per write method.

flow_if_else.condition.title: Condition
flow_if_else.condition.description: Python expression. Bindings: the payload bound by name matching the active input lane (text, image, audio, video, table, documents, questions, answers, classifications), state (per-chunk store), cond.* (contains, regex, length, score_threshold, field_equals, sentiment, always_true, always_false).

flow_if_else.timeout_s.title: Timeout (seconds)
flow_if_else.timeout_s.description: Maximum wall-clock time for a single condition evaluation. Timeout routes to ELSE (fail-closed).

flow_if_else.branches.title: Branch targets
flow_if_else.branches.description: Maps each branch name to the list of downstream node IDs on that branch. Populated automatically by the canvas when you wire edges from the THEN / ELSE output ports.
